overall.description: Static first-person perspective from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a futuristic apartment bedroom at sunset. The scene features warm orange light filtering through window blinds onto a bed while a television cycles through various neon advertisements and programs. The camera remains completely stationary throughout the clip.

scene_state.functional_zone: cyberpunk apartment bedroom with entertainment area

television cycles to colorful abstract advertisement animation

entered.detail: curved ceiling with parallel wooden slats creating a warm architectural feature
large window with horizontal blinds showing orange sunset sky and distant clouds
unmade bed with white linens and pillows in the foreground
flatscreen TV displaying various futuristic advertisements and programs
animal print blanket draped over furniture next to the bed
glowing cyan and pink neon sign on the dark wall
open magazine or book resting on the bed sheets

segments.scene_description: A static view of a cyberpunk apartment bedroom at dusk, with warm sunset light filtering through window blinds. The television cycles through various futuristic advertisements including Night City Wire and All Foods commercials while the camera remains stationary from a first-person perspective on the bed.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective within a cyberpunk bedroom as the ambient light and digital displays shift during a futuristic dusk. It begins with a view from the bed, where warm sunset light filters through window blinds to cast long shadows across the room. As the scene persists, the focus remains on a television that cycles through a series of neon-lit advertisements, transitioning from Night City Wire to All Foods commercials. The atmosphere gradually deepens in mood as the digital glow of the screen competes with the fading natural light of the city outside.
